channel.title: Allocators on memduh
channel.description: Recent content in Allocators on memduh

item.title: The Slab Allocator: An Object-Caching Kernel Memory Allocator
item.description:
The original paper introducing slab allocators for the Solaris kernel. Essential reading for understanding modern memory allocation techniques.

Author: Jeff Bonwick
Year: 1994
Conference: USENIX
